routingAccuracy.design: online learning from uniform prior (rep=50); noisy quality feedback; NOT initialized to ground-truth (fixes tautology). Baselines: ε-greedy (also learns, naive ε exploration) and pure random (no learning, no reputation).
routingAccuracy.note: reputation-guided online routing converges reputation to true-quality order and beats an ε-greedy learner and a random baseline; cumulative accuracy is LEARNED not assumed. steady-state (last-50) accuracy isolates post-convergence routing quality from cold-start exploration cost.

collusion.note: established-reputation collusion: ring inflates via mutual sqrt-weighted ratings; honest limitation (Bennett et al. arXiv:2605.18990)
